mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, id_card, phone, balance, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, last_login, status FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, name, id_card, phone, balance, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, last_login, status FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone}
SELECT id, username, password, name, id_card, phone, balance, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, last_login, status FROM user WHERE id_card = #{idCard}
SELECT id, username, password, name, id_card, phone, balance,avatar,gender, create_time, update_time, last_login, status FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, name =#{name}, phone =#{phone}, id_card =#{idCard}, balance =#{balance}, avatar =#{avatar}, gender =#{gender}, status =#{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
